measurement_note: Size is S = m + n. The square 5/20/100 tiers span 20x; each sorted row has its only one in the final column. The staircase solution makes m + 1 queries, while independent binary search in every row makes O(m log n) queries, remains below the 1000-call limit, completes normally, and is rejected by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 5 by 5 with one in the last column
benchmark: 20 by 20 with one in the last column
benchmark: 100 by 100 with one in the last column
